spIBDerverse 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference
    • Hammersley-Clifford theorem
    • homophily-measures

Transform vector to (a,b)

Source: R/transform_alpha.R
transform_alpha.Rd

Transform vector to (a,b)

Usage

transform_alpha(x, a = 0, b = 1)

Arguments

x

vector to transform

a

lower bound of transform

b

upper bound of transform

Value

transformed vector

Examples

transform_alpha(runif(100))
#>   [1] 0.91740068 0.56584751 0.74056449 0.67448740 0.35716962 0.04443018
#>   [7] 0.46430360 0.68111531 0.75669823 0.34481863 0.63715634 0.19902907
#>  [13] 0.16201792 0.53919465 0.40774497 0.22303158 0.16651137 0.01155355
#>  [19] 0.71069758 0.21116805 0.42287158 0.19126004 0.38766781 0.32248952
#>  [25] 0.15142851 0.23644763 0.96842281 0.16363094 0.10300261 0.33169641
#>  [31] 0.20011712 0.25795373 0.96316201 0.49405865 0.86323823 0.95982086
#>  [37] 0.10541496 0.39021987 0.10477529 0.59432126 0.47643293 0.62452001
#>  [43] 0.24466677 0.41163403 0.56885187 0.35524919 0.39743568 0.79225920
#>  [49] 0.51834809 0.11447307 0.35594027 0.23362572 0.92823323 0.23702583
#>  [55] 0.17549525 0.19801932 0.42086529 0.51555169 0.66669361 0.72049464
#>  [61] 0.76400136 0.47610539 0.04233535 0.92143531 0.01342183 0.03466923
#>  [67] 0.81755420 0.61192026 0.14759986 0.86506284 0.80107961 0.60741034
#>  [73] 0.09284885 0.31564230 0.03080249 0.91613649 0.35484282 0.52123798
#>  [79] 0.47392268 0.18627265 0.56137826 0.57081335 0.12816008 0.17976247
#>  [85] 0.90001391 0.33985442 0.44237163 0.24263482 0.61756071 0.21406462
#>  [91] 0.01875454 0.00000000 1.00000000 0.95043231 0.63723954 0.25455442
#>  [97] 0.07513089 0.59626484 0.25535839 0.78329824
